answer:
Zendesk is deprecating API tokens; they will stop working entirely by April 30, 2027. You must migrate to OAuth [1].

OAuth authentication requires setting an Authorization header with a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
```

To implement this, register an OAuth client in the Admin Center and use either the Authorization Code flow (for user-facing apps) or the Client Credentials flow (for background/server-to-server processes) to obtain your access token [2][1][3]. OAuth provides improved security through short-lived, refreshable tokens and fine-grained access scopes [2][1].
